title: Overloading, violation of SOPs have made Kashmir’s Gondola cable car vulnerable to technical snags
description: Set up in 1998, Gondola has two phases of rides: one from Gulmarg to Kongdoori (10 minutes ride) and another from Kongdoori to Apharwat (12 minutes ride), with the highest point located at an altitude of 4,390 metres (14,403 feet).
